positive: A minimal and stylized graphic design of a whimsical astronaut floating among geometric planets and nebula dust. The astronaut should have a clean, retro-futuristic silhouette, rendered in deep indigo and vibrant teal, set against a dark, cosmic backdrop. Scattered across the scene are simple, elegant geometric shapes (triangles, circles, stylized stars) forming constellations. The composition must be centered and symmetrical, designed for maximum visibility on a garment. Vector-style artwork, high contrast, linework detailing, flat color blocks, pop art aesthetic, clean edges, highly defined outlines. --ar 1:1
